description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red and orange skin, featuring subtle yellow undertones and a glossy finish. The apple has a natural, rounded shape with a slight asymmetry and a visible bite taken out of one side, exposing the pale, moist interior and seeds. A short brown stem protrudes from the top, accompanied by a single green leaf. The skin appears smooth and taut, with a healthy sheen that suggests freshness. The exposed flesh inside is creamy white, slightly translucent, and moist, with visible seed cavities. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant blemishes on the surface.
description: A glossy red-orange apple with a bite taken out, showing moist white flesh and a green leaf.
description_view_0: Red apple with a bite missing on the left, blackened leaf and stem visible.
description_view_1: Front view showing the large bitten section, exposing the apple's white interior and seeds.
description_view_2: Red apple with a bite missing on the right, green leaf and brown stem visible.
description_view_3: Unbitten side of the apple, smooth red-orange skin, stem and leaf at the top.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no other damage
